notes: Gave alongside Ruthie Mitchell at 1968 community fund drive.
Surviving spouse Audrey Pickens at audrey.pickens.bessemer@gmail.com is the active contact for legacy-touch communication.
Ruthie sat on this board 1969-1974.
Vestavia Hills donor, joined SCHF rolls in 1992. No 1960s connection.
Mountain Brook resident, gave through SCHF 1985 onward. No Ruthie crossover.
Small-business sustaining sponsor 1992-2018, retired program.
Annual donor 1996-2018. Note: distinct from First Bethel AME contact Eunice Tatum-Greene who serves as board secretary.
Hoover Civic Association joined SCHF 1985. No 1960s linkage.
Memorial fund created 1992. Mr. Lawson born 1955, no Ruthie-era overlap.
Civic club active 1980s, registered SCHF 1989.
Surname match only. LLC registered 2008. No genealogical link to Walter Pickens.
Annual subscription, not a donor relationship.
